components.title: Pump Station
components.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 1000 600" role="img"><defs><linearGradient id="pumpGradient"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2563eb"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#16a34a"/></linearGradient></defs><rect id="pump" class="pump" x="280" y="180" width="440" height="220" rx="36" fill="url(#pumpGradient)"/><text x="500" y="300" text-anchor="middle" fill="white">{{status}}</text></svg>
